_comment: Copy this to .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored) and fill in your Hyperspell credentials. Restart Claude Code to load the MCP server. Tools are restricted to read-only (search/get_memory/user_info) — writes to Hyperspell must go through convex/reinforce.ts per Invariant 2 in lib/hyperspell/client.ts. Version is pinned; bump deliberately.
